phases.name: Seed Unpack
phases.objective: load the compressed seed from the prior dimension

phases.name: Corpus Decomposition
phases.objective: split corpus, process, and growth channels into shards, motifs, bridges, contradictions, and candidate operators

phases.name: Deep Synthesis
phases.objective: run sparse high-yield synthesis across the active loop mandate

phases.name: Contradiction Pressure
phases.objective: surface contradictions, unresolved fibers, and over-compressions

phases.name: Born-Coordinate Discovery
phases.objective: mine candidate missing coordinates and bridge points

phases.name: Operator Extraction
phases.objective: convert discovered structure into operator law and transform grammar

phases.name: Representation And Registry Synthesis
phases.objective: rewrite discoveries into schemas, contracts, and admissible compositions

phases.name: Meta-Observation
phases.objective: observe the process itself and record persistent blind spots

phases.name: Adversarial Audit
phases.objective: attack false equivalences, unsupported claims, and dead loops

phases.name: Improvement Generation
phases.objective: emit a 16-section improvement ledger for the loop

phases.name: Prune Bloat
phases.objective: remove duplicate, stale, unsupported, replayless, and low-yield matter

phases.name: Compress To Seed
phases.objective: distill operators, bridges, proof kernels, and frontier memory into a stronger seed

phases.name: Liminal Transfer
phases.objective: bridge pre-closure into the next dimension's early seed

virtual_swarm.representation: factorized role tensor with sparse TopK activation

recurrence_equation: X_(n+1)^(2) = L o C o P o I o A o S (X_n^(2->14))
implementation_law: spawn a virtual 16^16 role tensor per phase
execute only the highest-yield sparse frontier
carry unresolved frontier and proof obligations into the next seed
